description: Simple metallic flats designed to charm you out of your staple feel-good heels, the design details on this pair looks just like crinkled aluminium foil in floral patterns. Goes well with dressy beach wear, this pair has an intentionally distressed look for a dressed down vibe. UpperMetallic thong style upper with floral details all overAnkle strap looping around the ankle with a buckle detailPadded footbedOutsoleTPU textured outsole with an upraised heelSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
